jobs.title: Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us: Do you thrive on crystal-clear processes, impeccable hygiene, and teamwork at a 5-star superior level? Become the driving force behind our culinary experiences and ensure flawless operations in the back-of-house. Your Responsibilities:
- Shift & Duty Planning across multiple outlets (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, external events) – you orchestrate seamless operations from mise-en-place to breakdown.
- Leadership & Coaching of the Stewarding Team: daily briefings, clear standards, motivating presence – and when the pressure is on, you lead by working hands-on.
- Hygiene & Quality Assurance at the highest level (HACCP-compliant): inspections, documentation, and training to guarantee spotless standards.
- Dishwashing & Equipment Management: efficient use of modern facilities, care and maintenance, acting as a key link between kitchen, service, and events.
- Inventory & Cost Control: keeping track of stock, chemicals, and consumables; ensuring efficient processes without downtime.
- Event Excellence: logistics for large-scale functions, setting up return stations, and managing swift turnarounds.

## Requisiti
- Experience in luxury hospitality/catering within Stewarding or Back-of-House – ideally in a supervisory or assistant managerial role.
- Practical mindset & overview: you make smart decisions, remain calm in peak times, and take ownership.
- Leadership & communication skills.
- Hands-on mentality: proactive, solution-oriented, and a role model for cleanliness, order, and efficiency.
- Solid knowledge of hygiene & technology: HACCP expertise, familiarity with cleaning technology, and confidence with planning/office tools.
- Flexibility: willingness to work shifts, weekends, and support events – you enjoy the pulse of a lively luxury property.
- Languages: Portuguese or Italian as well as English.

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Supervisore Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Contratto: Stagionale. Inizio attività: 2026-06-01. Le persone a 1800 metri sul livello del mare stanno plasmando il Viaggio di Lusso in Montagna. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti un Lusso intelligente per un'esperienza vacanziera inimitabile. Come membro del Gruppo Kulm di Lusso, fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispirante, unico e distintivo. E così abbracciamo la nostra cultura: il lusso sottile, l'ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo facciamo accadere. Questa è la tua occasione per essere un membro della nostra cultura in formazione: | Questo è ciò che porti con noi: Ti senti a tuo agio con processi chiari, igiene impeccabile e lavoro di squadra a livello 5 stelle? Diventa la forza trainante delle nostre esperienze culinarie e assicurati operazioni impeccabili nel retro cucina. Le tue Responsabilità: - Pianificazione dei turni e degli incarichi in diversi locali (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banchetti, eventi esterni) – orchestra operazioni fluide dalla mise-en-place alla chiusura. - Leadership e Coaching del Team Stewarding: briefing quotidiani, standard chiari, presenza motivante – e quando la pressione è alta, guidi lavorando a mani basse. - Igiene e Garanzia della Qualità al più alto livello (conforme HACCP): ispezioni, documentazione e formazione per garantire standard impeccabili. - Lavaggio dei piatti e Gestione degli Attrezzi: utilizzo efficiente delle moderne strutture, cura e manutenzione, agendo come un collegamento chiave tra cucina, servizio e eventi. - Controllo dell'Inventario e dei Costi: tener traccia degli scorte, dei prodotti chimici e dei consumabili; garantire processi efficienti senza interruzioni. - Eccellenza negli Eventi: logistica per funzioni di grandi dimensioni, impostazione di stazioni di ritorno e gestione di turnaround rapidi. ## Requisiti - Esperienza in hospitality/catering di lusso nel settore Stewarding o Back-of-House – idealmente in un ruolo di supervisione o assistente manageriale. - Mentalità pratica e panoramica: prendi decisioni intelligenti, rimani calmo nei momenti di picco e assumi la responsabilità. - Abilità di leadership e comunicazione. - Mentalità hands-on: proattivo, orientato alla soluzione e modello di pulizia, ordine ed efficienza. - Conoscenze solide di igiene e tecnologia: competenza HACCP, familiarità con la tecnologia di pulizia e sicurezza con gli strumenti di pianificazione/office. - Flessibilità: disponibilità a lavorare turni, fine settimana e supportare eventi – ti piace il ritmo di una proprietà di lusso vivace. - Lingue: Portoghese o Italiano oltre all'Inglese. ## Cosa offriamo - Al Gruppo Kulm, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo attraenti, alloggi comfort, pasti a prezzi accessibili nel ristorante per il personale e numerosi vantaggi.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Supervisor Stewarding (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle. Eintrittsdatum: 2026-06-01. Menschen auf 1800 Metern über dem Meeresspiegel gestalten das Luxus-Mountain-Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen intelligentes Luxus für ein unvergessliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxus-Kulm-Gruppe sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt tief inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und so umarmen wir unsere Kultur: unterschwelliger Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam machen wir das möglich. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Teil unserer gestaltenden Kultur zu werden: | Dies ist das, was Sie mit uns bewegen: Fühlen Sie Sie sich zu klaren Prozessen, makelloser Hygiene und Teamarbeit auf 5-Sterne-Niveau? Werden Sie die treibende Kraft hinter unseren kulinarischen Erlebnissen und sorgen Sie für makellose Operationen im Back-of-House. Ihre Verantwortlichkeiten: - Schicht- und Dienstplanung in mehreren Ausgaben (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Bankette, externe Veranstaltungen) – Sie orchestrieren nahtlose Operationen von der Mise-en-place bis zum Abbau. - Führung und Coaching des Stewarding-Teams: tägliche Briefings, klare Standards, motivierende Präsenz – und wenn der Druck hoch ist, führen Sie durch, indem Sie mit anpacken. - Hygiene und Qualitätskontrolle auf höchstem Niveau (HACCP-konform): Inspektionen, Dokumentation und Schulung, um makellose Standards zu gewährleisten. - Geschirrspülen und Geräteverwaltung: effiziente Nutzung moderner Anlagen, Pflege und Wartung, als Schlüsselverbindung zwischen Küche, Service und Veranstaltungen. - Inventar- und Kostenkontrolle: Verfolgung von Vorräten, Chemikalien und Verbrauchsmaterialien; Sicherstellung effizienter Prozesse ohne Stillstand. - Event-Exzellenz: Logistik für Großveranstaltungen, Einrichtung von Rückgabestationen und Management schneller Durchgänge. ## Anforderungen - Erfahrung im Luxus-Hospitalitäts- und Catering-Bereich im Bereich Stewarding oder Back-of-House – idealerweise in einer Führungs- oder Assistenten-Managerrolle. - Praktisches Denken und Überblick: Sie treffen intelligente Entscheidungen, bleiben in Spitzenzeiten ruhig und übernehmen Verantwortung. - Führungs- und Kommunikationstalent. - Hands-on-Mentalität: proaktiv, lösungsorientiert und Vorbild für Sauberkeit, Ordnung und Effizienz. - Solides Wissen über Hygiene und Technologie: HACCP-Kenntnisse, Vertrautheit mit Reinigungstechnologie und Vertrauen in Planungs-/Office-Tools. - Flexibilität: Bereitschaft, Schichten, Wochenenden und Veranstaltungen zu unterstützen – Sie genießen den Rhythmus eines lebendigen Luxusunternehmens. - Sprachen: Portugiesisch oder Italienisch sowie Englisch. ## Was wir bieten - Bei Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Mahlzeiten im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vorteile.

Vos Responsabilités: - Planification des quarts et des tâches dans plusieurs établissements (Grand Restaurant, Amaru, Pizzeria, Room Service, Banquets, événements externes) – vous orchestrez des opérations fluides de la mise-en-place au démontage. - Leadership et Coaching de l'équipe Stewarding: briefings quotidiens, normes claires, présence motivante – et quand la pression est forte, vous guidez en travaillant main dans la main. - Hygiène et Assurance de la Qualité au plus haut niveau (conforme HACCP): inspections, documentation et formation pour garantir des normes impeccables. - Lavage de la vaisselle et Gestion des équipements: utilisation efficace des installations modernes, entretien et maintenance, agissant comme un lien clé entre cuisine, service et événements. - Contrôle des stocks et des coûts: suivre les stocks, les produits chimiques et les consommables; garantir des processus efficaces sans temps d'arrêt. - Excellence des Événements: logistique pour de grandes fonctions, mise en place de stations de retour et gestion de tournants rapides. ## Exigences - Expérience dans l'hospitalité/catering de luxe dans le secteur Stewarding ou Back-of-House – idéalement dans un rôle de supervision ou d'assistant managerial. - Mentalité pratique et vue d'ensemble: vous prenez des décisions intelligentes, restez calme en période de pointe et assumez la responsabilité. - Compétences en leadership et communication. - Mentalité hands-on: proactif, orienté solution et modèle de propreté, d'ordre et d'efficacité. - Connaissances solides en hygiène et technologie: expertise HACCP, familiarité avec la technologie de nettoyage et confiance dans les outils de planification/office. - Flexibilité: volonté de travailler des quarts, des week-ends et de soutenir les événements – vous aimez le rythme d'une propriété de luxe animée. - Langues: Portugais ou Italien ainsi que l'Anglais. ## Ce que nous offrons - Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. jobs.title: Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
## Descrizione

Spa Therapist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

## Mansioni

- Pamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.
- With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.
- Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.
- Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.
- Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.
- Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.

## Requisiti

- Completed training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.
- Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.
- Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.
- Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.
- Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.
- Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.

## Cosa offriamo

- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success.
- We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Maître de Rang (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family. Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.

## Perché Kulm Group?
- Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.
- Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.
- Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.
- Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact. Be part of something extraordinary!

## Le tue mansioni
- You confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.
- You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.
- You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.
- You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.
- You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.
- You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.

## Requisiti
- A completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.
- Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.
- Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.
- Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.
- Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.
- Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us: At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.

## Mansioni
- Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
- Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
- Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.
- Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.
- Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.

## Requisiti
- Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.
- Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.
- Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.
- Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.
- Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success.
- We offer attractive development opportunities.
- Comfortable accommodations.
- Affordable meals in the staff restaurant.
- Numerous perks.

jobs.title: Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us: Luxurious. Ambitious. Visionary. In this newly created key position, you will actively shape the culinary direction of our property as the strategic driving force behind our Food & Beverage concepts. In this role, you will design the future of our F&B world — visionary, bold, and with the ambition to take excellence to the next level. What makes this role unique: Leadership at eye level: You lead a team of seven experienced department heads and approximately 70 employees — with clarity, inspiration, and a genuine talent for developing people. Concept architect & innovator: You evaluate existing concepts, develop new ideas, identify F&B trends and deliberately leverage them. You think on the next level and create experiences that excite our guests. Strategy meets profitability: Budgeting, forecasting, margin optimization — your decisions are data-driven while always keeping the guest experience at the forefront. Operational excellence: You establish quality standards, simplify processes, implement new tools, and modernize systems. For you, efficiency is a result of strong leadership. Connector & multiplier: You act as a strategic partner to General Management, Culinary, Marketing, Sales, and Events — with foresight, professionalism, and outstanding communication skills. Creating experiences rather than just planning them: From wine tastings and pop-up concepts to signature events — you curate memorable moments that stay with our guests long after their stay. | This is you: Completed training in hospitality or gastronomy – ideally complemented by further education in management. Several years of leadership experience in the F&B department of a luxury hotel. Excellent command of German and English; Italian is an advantage. Entrepreneurial mindset, strong affinity with numbers, and a sharp sense for quality. Hands-on mentality, diplomatic skills, and a confident presence in every situation. Are you ready to set new culinary standards and work with a passionate team at the highest level? Then we look forward to receiving your application. | Benefits: At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Food & Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stelleneintritt: 2026-02-01. Menschen auf 1800 Metern über dem Meeresspiegel gestalten das Luxus-Mountain-Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen intelligentes Luxus für ein unvergessliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxus Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt tief inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und so umarmen wir unsere Kultur: unterschwelliger Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Mitglied unserer gestaltenden Kultur zu werden: | Dies ist, was Sie mit uns bewegt: Luxuriös. Ambitioniert. Visionär. In dieser neu geschaffenen Schlüsselposition werden Sie aktiv die kulinarische Richtung unseres Hauses als strategische Antriebskraft hinter unseren Food & Beverage-Konzepten gestalten. In dieser Rolle entwerfen Sie die Zukunft unserer F&B-Welt — visionär, mutig und mit der Ambition, die Exzellenz auf das nächste Level zu bringen. Was diese Rolle einzigartig macht: Führung auf Augenhöhe: Sie führen ein Team von sieben erfahrenen Abteilungsleitern und etwa 70 Mitarbeitern — mit Klarheit, Inspiration und einem echten Talent für die Entwicklung von Menschen. Konzeptarchitekt & Innovator: Sie bewerten bestehende Konzepte, entwickeln neue Ideen, identifizieren F&B-Trends und nutzen sie gezielt. Sie denken auf der nächsten Ebene und schaffen Erlebnisse, die unsere Gäste begeistern. Strategie trifft Profitabilität: Budgetierung, Prognosen, Margenoptimierung — Ihre Entscheidungen sind datengetrieben, während Sie immer die Gasterfahrung im Vordergrund halten. Operative Exzellenz: Sie legen Qualitätsstandards fest, vereinfachen Prozesse, implementieren neue Tools und modernisieren Systeme. Für Sie ist Effizienz das Ergebnis starker Führung. Connector & Multiplier: Sie agieren als strategischer Partner für die Generalmanagement, die Küche, den Marketing, den Vertrieb und die Events — mit Voraussicht, Professionalität und herausragenden Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. Erlebnisse schaffen, statt sie nur zu planen: Von Weintastings und Pop-up-Konzepten bis hin zu Signatur-Events — Sie kuratieren unvergessliche Momente, die bei unseren Gästen lange nach ihrem Aufenthalt bleiben. | Das sind Sie: Abgeschlossene Ausbildung in der Hotellerie oder Gastronomie — idealerweise ergänzt durch weitere Studien im Management. Mehrere Jahre Führungserfahrung im F&B-Bereich eines Luxushotels. Exzellente Beherrschung der deutschen und englischen Sprache; Italienisch ist ein Vorteil. Unternehmermindset, starke Affinität zu Zahlen und ein scharfsinniger Qualitätsbewusstsein. Hands-on-Mentalität, diplomatische Fähigkeiten und ein selbstbewusstes Auftreten in jeder Situation. Sind Sie bereit, neue kulinarische Standards zu setzen und mit einem leidenschaftlichen Team auf höchstem Niveau zu arbeiten? Dann freuen wir uns auf Ihre Bewerbung. | Benefits: Bei Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Mahlzeiten im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Perks.

jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Driver (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

## Mansioni
- Warm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.
- Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.
- Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.
- Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.

## Requisiti
- Natural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.
- Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.
- Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.
- Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.
- Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

## Your Mission
Your stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home.

## Your Responsibilities
- Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality
- Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere
- Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome
- Combination of buffet service and live cooking
- Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure
- Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you
- Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew

## This is you
- Completed training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification
- Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry
- A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues
- Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style
- Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor
- Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus

If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.

## Benefits
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group bist du Teil des Erfolgsgeheimnisses. Gemeinsam gestalten wir jeden Aufenthalt tief inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und genau deshalb leben wir unsere Kultur: unaufdringlicher Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebensgefühl. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Hier ist deine Chance, Teil unserer prägenden Kultur zu werden: ## Aufgaben - Es geht nicht nur ums Kochen; es geht darum, zu einer kulinarischen Symphonie in einer Umgebung der höchsten 5-Sterne-Superior-Standards beizutragen. - Stationsexzellenz: Du unterstützt deinen Chef de Partie bei der täglichen "Mise en place" und beim Service in unseren renommierten Outlets und sorgst dafür, dass jeder Teller unseren ästhetischen und geschmacklichen Erwartungen entspricht. - Präzision in der Ausführung: Ob zarte Vorspeisen oder raffinierte Garnituren – du bereitest Komponenten mit Meisterschaft, Geschwindigkeit und tiefem Respekt vor dem Produkt zu. - Qualität & Konsistenz: Du überwachst die korrekte Lagerung der Rohstoffe und garantierst absolute Frische. - Ordnung und unnachgiebige Hygiene (HACCP) sind deine Visitenkarte. - Teamgeist: Du bist ein integraler Bestandteil der Brigade. - Wenn der Druck steigt, behältst du einen kühlen Kopf und unterstützt aktiv deine Kollegen, um unsere legendäre Exzellenz aufrechtzuerhalten. ## Anforderungen - Wir suchen ein leidenschaftliches kulinarisches Talent, das sich von der Energie einer High-End-Küche trägt. - Du folgst nicht einfach Rezepten; du verstehst die Seele der Feinschmeckerküche: - Ausbildung: Du bist ein zertifizierter Koch oder hast mindestens 2 Jahre solide Berufserfahrung in der gehobenen Gastronomie oder Luxushotellerie. - Fähigkeiten: Du beherrschst grundlegende Kochtechniken (Sautieren, Pochieren, Schmoren) und verfügst über exzellente Messerfertigkeiten. - Mindset: Du setzt die Standardrezepte des Hotels mit Überzeugung um und hast ein scharfes Auge für Details und kontinuierliche Verbesserung. - Zuverlässigkeit: Pünktlichkeit, ein professionelles Auftreten und ein sauberer, organisierter Arbeitsplatz sind für dich selbstverständlich. - Sprachen: Italienisch ist Pflicht, zusätzlich gute Kenntnisse in Englisch oder Deutsch. - Möchtest du deine Leidenschaft in unsere Küche im Grand Hotel Kronenhof einbringen? Wir freuen uns auf deine Bewerbung! ## Wir bieten - Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeitenden das Herz unseres Erfolgs. - Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Mahlzeiten in der Mitarbeiterkantine und zahlreiche Benefits.

Contrat : poste à durée déterminée de 10 mois. Début d’emploi : 05.06.2026. Les personnes vivant à 1800 mètres d’altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inégalée. En tant que membre du Luxury Kulm Group, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. C’est pourquoi nous incarnons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous le rendons possible. Voici votre chance de faire partie de notre culture en constante évolution : ## Missions - Il ne s’agit pas seulement de cuisiner ; il s’agit de contribuer à une symphonie culinaire dans un environnement de plus haut niveau 5 étoiles supérieur. - Excellence des postes : Vous soutenez votre Chef de Partie dans la "Mise en place" quotidienne et le service de nos points de restauration renommés, en veillant à ce que chaque assiette réponde à nos attentes esthétiques et gustatives. - Précision dans l’exécution : Qu’il s’agisse d’entrées délicates ou de garnitures sophistiquées, vous préparez des composants avec maîtrise, rapidité et un profond respect du produit. - Qualité et cohérence : Vous supervisez le stockage correct des matières premières et garantissez une fraîcheur absolue. - L’ordre et une hygiène irréprochable (HACCP) sont votre carte de visite professionnelle. - Esprit d’équipe : Vous êtes un maillon essentiel de la brigade. - Lorsque la pression monte, vous gardez votre sang-froid et soutenez activement vos collègues pour maintenir notre excellence légendaire. ## Exigences - Nous recherchons un talent culinaire passionné qui s’épanouit dans l’énergie d’une cuisine haut de gamme. - Vous ne suivez pas simplement des recettes ; vous comprenez l’âme de la gastronomie fine : - Formation : Vous êtes un cuisinier diplômé ou disposez d’au moins 2 ans d’expérience professionnelle solide dans la gastronomie haut de gamme ou l’hôtellerie de luxe. - Compétences : Vous maîtrisez les techniques culinaires de base (sauter, pocher, braiser) et possédez d’excellentes compétences en découpe au couteau. - Mentalité : Vous appliquez les recettes standard de l’hôtel avec confiance et avez un œil aiguisé pour les détails et l’amélioration continue. - Fiabilité : La ponctualité, une apparence professionnelle et un espace de travail propre et organisé sont pour vous une seconde nature. - Langues : L’italien est requis, ainsi qu’une bonne maîtrise du français ou de l’anglais. - Souhaitez-vous apporter votre passion dans notre cuisine au Grand Hotel Kronenhof ? jobs.title: Commis de Bar (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Commis de Bar (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

## Mansioni
- Atmosphere with Soul: You prepare the bar so that our guests feel the exclusive flair the moment they walk in—where every detail matters.  
- Liquid Art: You assist in the creation and elegant service of drinks and cocktails that perfectly reflect our exacting Kulm standards.  
- The Art of Hosting: You ensure that "wow-moment" both behind and in front of the bar, making sure our guests feel completely at home.  
- Storytelling in a Glass: With charm and expertise, you advise our guests and provide authentic recommendations from our exquisite beverage selection.  
- Behind the Scenes: You ensure smooth operations and pay meticulous attention to maintaining our high hygiene and quality standards.  

## Requisiti
- The Foundation: Ideally, you have completed a degree or apprenticeship in hospitality or gastronomy.  
- Initial Bar Experience: You know your way around a shaker, understand the basics of mixology, and have already gained some initial experience behind a bar.  
- A Taste for Excellence: You have a basic understanding of spirits and—as a real bonus—you are interested in the sophisticated world of cigars.  
- Language Talents: Our guests are international. You communicate confidently in German and English. If you also speak Italian, that’s the "olive in the martini."  
- Passion: You live for excellent service, possess a sophisticated appearance, and maintain your elegance even when the house is full.  

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

- Creative & varied menu planning – You design fresh, healthy, and delicious meals for our employees daily.

- Organizational talent & efficiency – You stay on top of things even in busy moments and work in a structured manner.
- Creativity & sustainability – You develop new ideas for diverse menus while maintaining a responsible approach to resources.
- Language: must-have: Italian, other languages are a plus

## Cosa offriamo
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.description:
## Chef de Partie - Gardemanger (m/w/d)  
**Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Kulm Hotel), St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden)**  
Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## Descrizione  
People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: | This is what you move with us: At the Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, we don’t just cook, we shape the future of Luxury Mountain Travel. As a Chef de Partie Gardemanger, you are a cornerstone of our kitchen brigade. You bring "Smart Luxury" to the plate, ensuring every dish is as inspiring as the alpine peaks surrounding us. This is your stage to combine craftsmanship with creativity in an international community of excellence.

## Mansioni  
- Station Ownership: You take full responsibility for your section, managing it with autonomy and ensuring every plate meets our 5-star standards.  
- Culinary Leadership: You act as a role model, embodying the Kulm principles and inspiring your team through continuous improvement and a "can-do" attitude.  
- Operational Mastery: You organize your workspace with surgical precision and plan daily activities to ensure a flawless service, even during peak hours.  
- Quality Guardian: You uphold the highest health and food safety regulations (HACCP) as a second nature, ensuring the well-being of our guests and colleagues.  
- Agility: You are ready to step up whenever needed, demonstrating true ownership and reliability.  

## Requisiti  
- Background: Completed professional culinary training and solid experience in a similar role—ideally within the luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy sector.  
- Language: You are fluent in English. Any additional languages (German and/or Italian) are a great advantage in our multicultural team.  
- Mindset: You possess excellent time-management skills and stay cool when the heat is on.  
- Spirit: You don't just work in a kitchen; you live for the "Understated Luxury" and the unique life experience that the Engadin offers.  

## Cosa offriamo  
- Be part of a legendary success story. We offer a dynamic, international environment where your contribution is seen and valued.  
- From structured career growth to the unique perks of the Kulm Group, we provide the platform for you to reach your peak.  
- At the Kulm Group, our employees are the key to our success. We are renowned for our impeccable service as well as our passion for high-end luxury, winter sports, and haute cuisine.  
- With us, you will not only find the perfect platform to advance your career but also an outstanding employee experience with numerous amenities and benefits.  

## Contatto  
Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden)

jobs.title: Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz (Grand Hotel Kronenhof), Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-08-01.

People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:

## Mansioni
- You are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.
- You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.
- You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.
- You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.
- You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.
- You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.

## Cosa offriamo
- Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future.
- You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.

## Requisiti
- Professional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.
- Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.
- Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.
- Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.
- Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.

## Benefit
- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Et ainsi, nous embrassons notre culture: le luxe discret, l'inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous le faisons advenir. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture en formation: ## Responsabilités - Vous êtes la voix de notre hôtel: Que ce soit par téléphone ou par e-mail, vous créez des offres convaincantes, confirmez les réservations et vous assurez que les suivis sont gérés avec précision – tout en respectant les normes LHW et ISO. - Vous pensez en termes d'occupation et d'opportunité: Vous maintenez notre plan de réservations à jour et précis, contribuant activement à l'utilisation optimale de notre inventaire de chambres. - Vous donnez vie aux chiffres: En collaboration étroite avec l'Assistant Manager Exécutif et le Front Office Manager, vous développez des prévisions et des rapports essentiels pour la planification quotidienne. - Vous êtes méticuleux avec les données: Les profils des invités et les bases de données sont maintenus avec soin et discrétion – la structure et la conformité font partie de votre ADN. - Vous restez à la pointe: De la gestion du système Channel Manager à l'affinement continu de nos normes ISO et RIMS – vous vous assurez que les opérations se déroulent sans accroc et apportez de nouvelles idées à la table. - Vous transformez le potentiel en performance: L'upselling est plus qu'une tâche pour vous – c'est un moyen d'améliorer le voyage de l'invité et de créer une valeur ajoutée significative. ## Ce que nous offrons - Parce que vous ferez partie de l'un des hôtels les plus renommés de Suisse – un lieu où vous ne travaillez pas seulement, mais aidez à façonner l'avenir. - Vous serez entouré de professionnels passionnés et vivrez une culture d'équipe définie par l'élégance, l'authenticité et la collaboration. ## Exigences - Expérience professionnelle: Vous avez terminé une formation professionnelle dans l'hôtellerie ou dans un secteur commercial – idéalement dans l'hôtellerie de luxe – et offrez plusieurs années d'expérience pertinente. - Mentalité de vente: Vous comprenez ce qui motive les décisions de réservation et comment améliorer l'expérience de l'invité par des ventes stratégiques de chambres. - Compétences linguistiques: Vous parlez et écrivez couramment en allemand et en anglais; des connaissances supplémentaires en français ou en italien sont un plus. - Composure et clarté: Que ce soit sous pression ou en communication directe avec les invités, vous restez professionnel, efficace et chaleureux. - Dynamisme et orientation vers la croissance: Vous êtes impatient non seulement de satisfaire les attentes, mais aussi d'améliorer les processus et d'investir dans votre propre développement. ## Avantages - Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attractives, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages supplémentaires.

- At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.
